attributes.description: Sets the radio to a readonly state.
attributes.name: readonly

attributes.description:
The radio's size. When used inside a radio group, the size will be determined by the radio group's size so this
attribute can typically be omitted.
attributes.name: size

attributes.description: The radio's value. When selected, the radio group will receive this value.
attributes.name: value

cssParts.description: The circular container that wraps the radio's checked state.
cssParts.name: control

cssParts.description: The radio control when the radio is checked.
cssParts.name: control--checked

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the radio's label.
cssParts.name: label

events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.
events.name: syn-blur

events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.
events.name: syn-focus

properties.description: Sets the radio to a readonly state.
properties.name: readonly

properties.description:
The radio's size. When used inside a radio group, the size will be determined by the radio group's size so this
attribute can typically be omitted.
properties.name: size

properties.description: The radio's value. When selected, the radio group will receive this value.
properties.name: value

summary: Radios allow the user to select a single option from a group.
